title: Date Difference Calculator - Days Between Dates
description: Free date difference calculator. Find the number of days, weeks, months, and years between two dates.
keywords: date difference calculator, days between dates, date calculator, time between dates
intro: Calculate the exact difference between two dates in years, months, weeks, and days.

faq.q: How is the date difference calculated?
faq.a: The calculator computes the exact number of days between two dates, then breaks it down into years, months, weeks, and remaining days.

faq.q: Does it account for leap years?
faq.a: Yes, the calculation uses JavaScript's built-in Date object which correctly handles leap years and varying month lengths.
